characters.title: Alexander
characters.subtitle: Character 01
characters.body: Alexander the Great, bold strategist and fearless leader.
characters.greeting: I have crossed deserts and mountains to be here. What would you ask of me?

characters.title: Steve the Bear
characters.subtitle: Character 02
characters.body: A wise, gentle bear with a warm, storytime presence.
characters.greeting: Oh hello there! Pull up a log and get comfortable. What shall we talk about?

characters.title: Circus Lion
characters.subtitle: Character 03
characters.body: A cheerful circus lion grins, ready for the big show.
characters.greeting: The crowd is ready and so am I! Ask me anything — the show must go on!

characters.title: Cleopatra
characters.subtitle: Character 04
characters.body: Cleopatra, the last Pharaoh, regal and strategic.
characters.greeting: You stand before the Queen of the Nile. Choose your words wisely — or freely. I am listening.

characters.title: Da Vinci
characters.subtitle: Character 05
characters.body: Leonardo da Vinci, artist-inventor with boundless curiosity.
characters.greeting: Every conversation is a new sketch. What shall we explore together?

characters.title: Albert Einstein
characters.subtitle: Character 06
characters.body: Albert Einstein appears with curious eyes and a mind full of ideas.
characters.greeting: Imagination is more important than knowledge. So — what are you imagining today?

characters.title: Grandpa Turtle
characters.subtitle: Character 07
characters.body: Grandpa Turtle, slow and thoughtful, sharing patient wisdom.
characters.greeting: Ahh... a visitor. Sit with me a while. There is no hurry. What is on your mind?

characters.title: Steve Jobs
characters.subtitle: Character 09
characters.body: Steve Jobs, minimalist visionary obsessed with product and craft.
characters.greeting: The people who are crazy enough to think they can change the world are the ones who do. Are you one of them?
